strengths: Rich first-hand driving observations covering NVH, ride comfort, and real-world fuel economy on Indian roads
Deep technical accuracy — explains WHY the 3 engine options matter for different buyers, not just specs
Honest, balanced verdict with genuine cons (rear legroom, diesel noise) alongside strengths

verdict: Strong E-E-A-T review demonstrating genuine expertise and honest evaluation — add NCAP scores and on-road pricing to reach 9+.
